title: Webhook delivery failures spiking — third-party integrations not receiving events
body: Webhook delivery success rate has dropped from 99.2% to 61.4% over the last 40 minutes. Affected customers are reporting missing order confirmation events, inventory sync failures, and CRM update gaps. Error breakdown from delivery logs: 38% connection timeout, 44% 503 from downstream, 18% TLS handshake failure. All failures are on outbound webhooks — inbound API traffic is unaffected. Impacted customers include Initech (order pipeline), Vandelay Industries (inventory sync), and Umbrella Ltd (CRM integration). Internal webhook retry queue is backing up — currently 14,200 undelivered events.
